allow: Bash(node -e "const fb = require\('firebase/auth'\); console.log\('getReactNativePersistence:', typeof fb.getReactNativePersistence\); console.log\('initializeAuth:', typeof fb.initializeAuth\); console.log\('version:', require\('firebase/package.json'\).version\);")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\('firebase/auth'\); const keys = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('persist'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('native'\)\); console.log\('persist/native keys:', keys\); console.log\('version:', require\('firebase/package.json'\).version\);")
